mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRANSACTION_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRANSACTIONS ( TRANSACTION_ID, PRODUCT_NO, SELLER_EMAIL, BUYER_EMAIL, PAYMENT_TYPE, AMOUNT, TRADE_STATUS, TRADE_DATE, TOSS_PAY_KEY, TOSS_ORDER_ID, PAY_STATUS, USE_ESCROW ) SELECT #{transactionId}, #{productNo}, P.SELLER_EMAIL, #{buyerEmail}, #{paymentType}, #{amount}, '거래중', SYSTIMESTAMP, #{tossPayKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tossOrderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useEscrow, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM PRODUCTS P WHERE P.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.select: SELECT TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, BUYER_EMAIL AS buyerEmail, PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, AMOUNT AS amount, PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, TOSS_ORDER_ID AS tossOrderId, TOSS_PAY_KEY AS tossPayKey, USE_ESCROW AS useEscrow FROM TRANSACTIONS WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND BUYER_EMAIL = #{buyerEmail} AND PAY_STATUS = 'READY' ORDER BY TRADE_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT T.TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, T.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, T.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, T.BUYER_EMAIL AS buyerEmail, T.PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, T.AMOUNT AS amount, T.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, T.TRADE_DATE AS tradeDate, T.COMPLETE_DATE AS completeDate, T.TOSS_PAY_KEY AS tossPayKey, T.TOSS_ORDER_ID AS tossOrderId, T.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, T.APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, T.USE_ESCROW AS useEscrow, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, (SELECT I.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE I WHERE I.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS imgUrl, MS.USER_NAME AS sellerName, MB.USER_NAME AS buyerName FROM TRANSACTIONS T LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS P ON T.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER MS ON T.SELLER_EMAIL = MS.EMAIL LEFT JOIN MEMBER MB ON T.BUYER_EMAIL = MB.EMAIL WHERE T.TOSS_ORDER_ID = #{orderId}

SELECT T.TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, T.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, T.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, T.BUYER_EMAIL AS buyerEmail, T.PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, T.AMOUNT AS amount, T.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, T.TRADE_DATE AS tradeDate, T.COMPLETE_DATE AS completeDate, T.TOSS_PAY_KEY AS tossPayKey, T.TOSS_ORDER_ID AS tossOrderId, T.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, T.APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, T.USE_ESCROW AS useEscrow, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, (SELECT I.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE I WHERE I.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS imgUrl, MS.USER_NAME AS sellerName, MB.USER_NAME AS buyerName FROM TRANSACTIONS T LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS P ON T.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER MS ON T.SELLER_EMAIL = MS.EMAIL LEFT JOIN MEMBER MB ON T.BUYER_EMAIL = MB.EMAIL WHERE T.TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TRANSACTIONS SET TOSS_PAY_KEY = #{tossPayKey}, PAY_STATUS = #{payStatus}, APPROVED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId}
UPDATE TRANSACTIONS SET TRADE_STATUS = '거래완료', COMPLETE_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId} AND USE_ESCROW = 'Y' AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE'
UPDATE TRANSACTIONS SET PAY_STATUS = 'DONE', TRADE_STATUS = '거래중', COMPLETE_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId} AND AMOUNT = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TOSS_PAYMENT_LOGS ( LOG_ID, TRANSACTION_ID, LOG_TYPE, API_ENDPOINT, HTTP_METHOD, REQUEST_DATA, RESPONSE_DATA, HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODE, ERROR_MSG, REQUESTED_AT, REQUEST_IP ) VALUES ( SEQ_PAYLOG_ID.NEXTVAL, #{transactionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{logType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apiEndpoint, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{responseData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{httpStatus, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{errorCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{requestIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO TOSS_CARD_PAYMENTS ( CARD_PAY_ID, TRANSACTION_ID, CARD_COMPANY_CD, CARD_COMPANY, CARD_NUM, CARD_TYPE, INSTALLMENT, IS_NO_INTEREST, OWNER_TYPE, ACQUIRE_STATUS, RECEIPT_URL ) VALUES ( SEQ_CARD_PAY_ID.NEXTVAL, #{transactionId}, #{cardCompanyCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardCompany, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installment, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{isNoInterest, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ownerType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acquireStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiptUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
